title: Inventory
description: A user's complete food stock at home. One document per user. Used by Agent 4 to produce available_ids for Agent 5 and a shopping list for Agent 8.

id.description: Unique inventory document ID (UUID v4). One per user.

user_id.description: References User.id. Unique constraint — one inventory per user.

items.description: List of food items the user has at home. An empty array is valid.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime. Updated on every mutation to this document.

InventoryItem.description: A single food entry in the user's inventory. Can reference a known FoodItem or be a free-text unknown entry.

food_item_id.description: References FoodItem.id. Must be null when is_custom_entry = true. When set, the food item must exist in the database.

quantity.description: Amount currently available in the given unit. 0 = out of stock (item is kept, not removed). Never negative.

unit.description: Measurement unit for quantity. Only 'g' (grams) supports automatic inventory deduction in MVP 1.

is_custom_entry.description: true = item is not linked to a FoodItem in the DB. food_item_id must be null. custom_item_name must be provided.

custom_item_name.description: Required when is_custom_entry = true. Free-text label entered by the user. Used for display and shopping list only — no calorie data available.

added_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime. Set when the item is first added to the inventory.
